Pic-ac..personality: A mentally and physically exhausted individual who has been worn down by intellectual overwork, grief, or depressing emotions. They present as profoundly indifferent to their surroundings, lacking willpower and motivation, preferring to lie down and avoid all exertion. They seek cool air and rest, and are averse to conversation, thinking, or any form of engagement with the world.
Pic-ac..mental_state: The defining feature is severe brain fag — complete mental prostration from the slightest intellectual effort, with inability to study, read, or concentrate without triggering headaches, spinal burning, and physical collapse. There is progressive cognitive deterioration suggesting softening of brain and cord, with loss of interest in all things and an inability to sustain any mental work. The mind is weakened to the point where willpower fails entirely, and even controlling one's own impulses becomes impossible.
Pic-ac..emotional_pattern: Extreme indifference and apathy dominate, with irritability surfacing only when forced into mental exertion. There is a deep vulnerability to grief and depressing emotions, which act as exciting causes of the entire symptom picture. Beneath the flat affect lies a loss of self-mastery, where the exhausted mind can no longer regulate emotional or sexual impulses, producing a paradoxical coexistence of profound apathy with uncontrolled excitability.
